name: After Hours
short_description: Groundbreaking research is encrypted on a computer from the 80's. Look through the computer and search the internet to crack the encryption in this augmented reality puzzle game.
detailed_description:
Find the password, crack the encryption

A great scientist went missing some thirty years ago, and no one has been able to decrypt his now legendary, encrypted research. It's your turn to take a swing at it.

If you would find yourself in front of an old computer today, and discover something you don't really understand - what would you do? Pick up your smartphone and Google, right? After Hours blends the line between gaming and reality in an outside-the-box experience.
